seoTitle: Lake Cathie vs Lake Conjola — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lake Cathie and Lake Conjola. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lake Cathie vs Lake Conjola: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lake Cathie and Lake Conjola.
heading: Lake Cathie vs Lake Conjola — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lake Cathie, New South Wales and Lake Conjola, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lake Cathie has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Lake Conjola (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lake Cathie or Lake Conjola safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lake Cathie has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Lake Conjola scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lake Cathie scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Lake Conjola scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lake Cathie or Lake Conjola?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lake Cathie has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
